title: LuckyVault
description: LuckyVault is a server-side lottery mod for NeoForge Minecraft offering a fun lottery experience. Players buy tickets to win diamonds in automated draws with live announcements and a leaderboard.
body:
# 🎟️ LuckyVault – A Fully Configurable Server-Side Lottery System for NeoForge 🎟️  

**LuckyVault** is a powerful, fully **server-side** lottery system designed for **NeoForge-based Minecraft servers**.  
Give your players a fun, automated way to **buy tickets, win prizes, and compete on leaderboards** – all while keeping your economy balanced!  

🔹 **Now Open-Source!** – Secure, transparent, and community-driven. Anyone can contribute, customize, and enhance the mod!  

---

## ✨ Features  

✅ **Automated Lottery Draws** 🎰  
- The system **automatically selects a winner** at scheduled intervals, ensuring **randomized and fair results**.  

✅ **Configurable Currency System** 💰  
- No longer restricted to diamonds! You can now **choose any item** (diamonds, emeralds, netherite, custom items) as the lottery currency.  
- Players buy tickets and receive winnings in **your chosen currency**.  

✅ **Dynamic Winner Announcements** 🎆  
- **Full-screen title messages** + **fast-burst fireworks** + **a celebratory jingle** for an exciting winner reveal!  
- Fully configurable announcement messages & effects.  

✅ **Leaderboard Tracking** 🏆  
- Displays **top winners** over time, adding a competitive edge to the game.  

✅ **Unclaimed Winnings Storage** 🎟️  
- If a player **wins but isn’t online**, their winnings are **safely stored** for them to claim later.  

✅ **Simple & Intuitive Commands** 💻  
- `/lottery` – View **lottery info, current pot, last winner, and time until next draw**.  
- `/lottery buy` – Purchase a ticket for the next draw (subject to limits).  
- `/lottery claim` – Claim unclaimed winnings if you were offline during a draw.  
- `/lottery leaderboard` – View the **top winners** on the server.  
- `/lottery draw` – Manually force a draw (admin only).  
- `/lottery cleareffects` – Remove all active lottery-related effects (admin only).  

✅ **Fully Server-Side & Performance-Friendly** ⚙️  
- No client installation required – works **seamlessly with vanilla clients**.  
- **Minimal performance impact**, making it **ideal for economy-based servers** and long-term play.  

✅ **NeoForge Compatibility** 🔧  
- Specifically built for **NeoForge-based** Minecraft servers, ensuring smooth integration.  

---

## 🔮 Future Plans  

🔹 **Expanded Economy Support** – Potential integration with in-game economy mods for virtual currency usage.  
🔹 **More Customization** – Flexible draw intervals, jackpot multipliers, and admin-configurable rewards.  
🔹 **Enhanced Visual Effects** – More celebratory animations & unique winner effects.  

---

## 📥 Installation & Compatibility  

- **Requires NeoForge** (Latest stable version recommended).  
- **Server-Side Only** – No client installation needed.  
- **Works with vanilla clients** – Players **do not** need mods to participate.  

---

🎉 **Add LuckyVault to your NeoForge server today and let your players win big!** 🚀
